senses.definition: a clock that can be set to an exact time to make a sound and wake someone up

examples.x: I always set multiple alarms on my alarm clock to ensure I wake up.
I need to replace the broken alarm clock with a new one.
I put my alarm clock across the room to force myself to get out of bed.
She tapped the alarm clock to silence the beeping noise.
The alarm clock has a backup battery in case of a power outage.

senses.definition: the necessary things that you need for doing a particular activity or job

examples.x: She packed her camping equipment, including a tent and a sleeping bag.
The chef uses a variety of kitchen equipment, including knives and pans.
The electrician carried a toolbox full of equipment for repairing electrical issues.
The laboratory is equipped with scientific equipment for conducting experiments.
The movie crew unloaded film equipment to set up for shooting.

senses.definition: a machine or tool that is designed for a particular purpose

examples.x: The flashlight is a simple yet helpful device during power outages.
The music player is a popular handheld device for listening to songs.
The remote control is a convenient device to operate the TV from a distance.
The teacher used an interactive device to engage students in the lesson.
The translator device helps tourists communicate in different languages.

senses.definition: a piece of equipment that makes sounds louder, used for playing music, etc.

examples.x: Please lower the volume on the loudspeaker; it's too loud.
The DJ adjusted the settings on the loudspeaker to enhance the sound quality.
The loudspeaker at the airport announced the boarding information.
The police officer used a loudspeaker to give instructions to the crowd.
The tour guide spoke through a loudspeaker to the group of tourists.

senses.definition: a device or piece of equipment for taking photographs, making movies or television programs

examples.x: He borrowed his friend's camera to document the event.
The camera flash helped brighten the dark room.
The detective checked the security footage from the camera.

senses.definition: an electric machine that is used to clean dishes, spoons, cups, etc.

examples.x: He pressed the "start" button on the dishwasher and walked away.
She loaded the dirty dishes into the dishwasher after dinner.
The dishwasher is energy-efficient, saving water and electricity.
The dishwasher's control panel has intuitive buttons for easy operation.
The new dishwasher has a quick wash cycle for small loads.

senses.definition: an electric machine used for washing clothes

examples.x: He forgot to empty the pockets before putting the clothes in the washing machine.
My parents bought a new washing machine with advanced features.
She put her dirty clothes in the washing machine and added detergent.
The washing machine has different settings for different types of fabrics.
The washing machine's spin cycle helps remove excess water from the clothes.

senses.definition: a box-shaped piece of equipment with a front door that is usually part of a stove, used for baking, cooking, or heating food

examples.x: He used the oven's timer to remind him to check on the cookies.
She accidentally burned her hand while reaching into the hot oven.
The oven's temperature knob can be adjusted for precise cooking.
They roasted a whole chicken in the oven for Sunday dinner.

senses.definition: a machine used for making coffee

examples.x: She cleaned the coffee maker's filter to remove any coffee residue.
She used a paper filter in the coffee maker to prevent grounds from getting into the coffee.
She uses a coffee maker every morning to brew her favorite coffee.
The coffee maker makes a sound when the brewing process is complete.
The coffee maker's warming plate keeps the coffee hot until you're ready to drink it.

senses.definition: an electrical appliance, designed like a small oven that can function as an oven or a toaster

examples.x: She uses a toaster oven to quickly toast her bread in the morning.
The toaster oven's compact size makes it ideal for small kitchens.
The toaster oven's door should be closed tightly during cooking to retain heat.
They bought a toaster oven with a digital display for precise cooking.
They used the toaster oven to make open-faced sandwiches for lunch.

senses.definition: a machine that is designed to cool and dry the air in a room, building, or vehicle

examples.x: He called a technician to repair the air conditioner when it stopped working.
The air conditioner cools the room quickly, even on the hottest days.
The air conditioner has a timer function, so you can set it to turn off automatically.
The air conditioner's remote control allows you to adjust the temperature from a distance.
They turned up the air conditioner when guests arrived to keep everyone comfortable.

senses.definition: a piece of equipment that produces heat to warm a place or increase the temperature of water

examples.x: She turned on the heater to warm up the room.
The heater is essential during the chilly nights.
The heater makes a humming sound when it's on.
The heater's thermostat controls the temperature.
They turned off the heater when they left the house.

senses.definition: a device that is used for listening to programs that are broadcast

examples.x: The radio program has interesting interviews.
The radio provides the latest weather updates.
They are dancing to the music on the radio.
They turned off the radio when they went to sleep.
We enjoy listening to the radio during our road trips.

senses.definition: a communication device used for talking to people who are far away and also have a similar device

examples.x: He needs to recharge his telephone battery.
She picked up the telephone to call her friend.
She received a call from an unknown number on her telephone.
The telephone rang, but no one answered.
They recorded the conversation on the telephone for future reference.

senses.definition: a telephone connection or service

examples.x: He dialed the number, and a voice answered on the other end of the line.
I need to make an important call, but the line is busy.
She placed the receiver back on the phone and hung up the line.

senses.definition: a device that you use to blow warm air over our hair to dry it

examples.x: I bought a travel-sized hair dryer for my vacations.
My sister's hair dryer has a powerful motor for faster drying.
She used a hair dryer to dry her wet hair quickly.
The hair dryer has different heat settings for styling.
The hair dryer's diffuser helps enhance natural curls.

senses.definition: an electric device with blades that rotate quickly and keep an area cool

examples.x: He adjusted the fan's speed to get the right level of airflow.
She placed a small fan on her desk to stay refreshed while studying.
The fan is energy-efficient, so it won't increase your electricity bill much.

senses.definition: an electrical device that pulls up dirt and dust from a floor to clean it

examples.x: Before using the vacuum cleaner, make sure to remove any large objects from the floor.
I borrowed my neighbor's vacuum cleaner to clean my apartment.
My mom uses the vacuum cleaner to clean the carpets every week.
The old vacuum cleaner stopped working, so we bought a new one.
The vacuum cleaner makes cleaning the house much easier.

senses.definition: a piece of equipment with a heated flat metal base, used to smooth clothes

examples.x: The iron is hot, so be careful when touching it.
The iron removes wrinkles from the fabric and makes it smooth.

senses.definition: a small device that lets you control electrical or electronic devices like TVs from a distance

examples.x: He pressed the button on the remote control to pause the movie.
My dad loves using the remote control to switch between different sports channels.
She bought a new remote control for her smart TV to access all its features.
The remote control for the garage door opener allows easy access to the house.
The remote control makes it convenient to operate electronic devices from a distance.

senses.definition: a device that detects smoke and gives a warning

examples.x: I forgot to replace the battery in the smoke detector, so it wasn't working properly.
The landlord installed a new smoke detector in the rental apartment.
The smoke detector is equipped with a loud alarm to warn residents of a potential fire.
The smoke detector is sensitive to smoke and can detect fires at an early stage.
The smoke detector requires proper maintenance to ensure it functions correctly.

senses.definition: to cause a machine, device, or system to start working or flowing, usually by pressing a button or turning a switch

examples.x: Can you help me turn on the TV?
It's hot in the room; let's turn on the air conditioner.
The chef asked the kitchen staff to turn on the oven to prepare the meal.
The mechanic had to turn on the engine to diagnose the problem.

senses.definition: to cause a machine, device, or system to stop working or flowing, usually by pressing a button or turning a switch

examples.x: Don't forget to turn off the TV when you're finished watching it.
It's bedtime; let's turn off the computer and get some rest.
Please remember to turn off the lights before leaving the room.
He forgot to turn off the stove after cooking dinner.
You can save energy by turning off the air conditioner when you don't need it.
She reminded him to turn off the engine before refueling the car.
She turned off the gas after cooking.
He forgot to turn off the water in the bathroom.
They turned off the heating to save energy.
Make sure to turn off the stove when you are done cooking.

senses.definition: (of a machine or device) to operate or function properly

examples.x: Can you explain how the software works?
The computer is working perfectly now.
The elevator is not working, we have to take the stairs.
The heater works by natural gas or electricity.
The recycling process works by breaking down materials and reusing them.

senses.definition: not working properly or at all

examples.x: I can't use these broken headphones anymore.

senses.definition: to do something with an object, method, etc. to achieve a specific result

examples.x: He is using his phone to take a picture.
I am making a smoothie using frozen fruit and yogurt.
I use my keys to unlock the door.
The sharp blade makes the knife easy to use for chopping vegetables.
What type of oil do you use for cooking?

senses.definition: a group of parts that work together for a common purpose

examples.x: Our school uses an online learning system for assignments and grades.
The recycling system in the neighborhood separates paper, plastic, and glass.

senses.definition: to fix something that is damaged, broken, or not working properly

examples.x: Can you help me repair this torn book page with tape?
He knows how to repair bicycles, so he fixed mine.
She learned how to repair the flat tire on her bicycle.
The mechanic will repair my car's engine tomorrow.
The workshop can repair the broken furniture.

senses.definition: a portable handheld electric light that is powered by batteries and used to give light to a place in the dark

examples.x: During the blackout, everyone relied on their flashlights.
I used a flashlight to find my way in the dark.
She always keeps a flashlight in her bag for emergencies.
We used the flashlight to look for lost keys in the yard.
When the power went out, I reached for my flashlight.

senses.definition: a thick piece of woven cloth, used as a floor covering

examples.x: I laid the baby down on the soft carpet for a nap.
I vacuumed the carpet to remove the dust and dirt.
My grandmother got angry when I accidentally spilled juice on the carpet.
The Persian carpet in the living room adds elegance and style to the space.
The soft carpet feels nice under my feet.

senses.definition: pieces of equipment such as tables, desks, beds, etc. that we put in a house or office so that it becomes suitable for living or working in

examples.x: My father cleaned and polished the wooden furniture to keep it looking nice.
The dining room has a table and chairs as furniture.
The furniture store has a wide section of sofas, tables, and chairs.
We bought new furniture for our bedroom, including a bed and a wardrobe.
We need to move the heavy furniture to vacuum the carpet.
